description: Deed of sale. In the hand of Natan b. Shemuel (dated documents: 1128–64). A few words from the reshut formula are preserved, but it is not possible to tell if Maṣliaḥ Gaon or Shemuel b. Hananya is intended. Fāḍila bt. Ḥalfon/Khalaf ha-Kohen sells a quarter (of a house) to Abū l-ʿAlā b. Abū l-Surūr. Signed by: Natan b. Shelomo ha-Kohen, Yosef ha-Levi, Yeshuʿa b. Ḥotam, ha-Levi Natan b. Ḥalfon ha-Kohen, Yakhin b. Yeshuʿa, Yehuda b. Elʿazar, Avraham b. Yosef, and Yeshuʿa ha-Kohen. Verso: Addendum (faṣl). Subsequent deed of sale certifying that the blind man Ṣadaqa b. Yiṣḥaq has purchased the same property from Abū l-ʿAlā b. Abū l-Surūr for the same price, namely 12.5 dinars. (Information in part from CUDL and from Goitein's index card(?).) Join: Alan Elbaum. AA. ASE.
description_he: שטר מכר; בכתב ידו של נתן בן שמואל; פאדילה בת חלפון/ח'לף הכהן מוכרת רבע (בית) לאבו אל-עלא בן אבו אל-סרור; נספח: שטר מכר נוסף לצדקה העיוור
